title: Appendix E: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review – FAS diagnostic checklist - Canada.ca
content:
## Appendix E: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review – FAS diagnostic checklist

## Appendix E : FAS Diagnostic Checklist
Source: Burd & Martsolf (1989, p. 40)
For readers interested in the PDF version, the document is available for downloading or viewing:
Appendix E : FAS Diagnostic Checklist (64.25 KB - 2 pages)
= 10 – height percentile

Number of facial features
3. Neuropsychological
Comorbid neuropsychiatiric conditions
<85 = 4 points <70 = 8 points <50 = 10 points
Sleep (consecutive hours, select only one)
<6 = 1 point <4 = 5 points <2 = 10 points
10 – communication score
10 – daily living score
10 – socialization score
10 – motor skills score
Foster care placement
Inpatient hospital care
1 point each month probation/ incarceration
1 point each hour of service per day
1 point each month in the last year
- For more information, contact the Division of Childhood and Adolescence
